RULING - A R G U E D; THE MATTER WAS CALLED TWICE IN ORDER FOR MR. MARNE TO READ PAPERS FILED BY THE INTERESTED PARTY LAYERS LLC WHICH WAS E-MAILED TO COUNSEL. ASSIGNEE CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INCORPORATED'S Motion Requesting Direction From The Court regarding the Receiver who was appointed by the Court to seize, surrender and sell a Liquor License in the Name of the Judgment Debtor is Denied. The relief sought will prejudice the intended purchaser of the liquor license and the court will not disturb the sale made by the receiver. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/HEK)

RULING - ASSIGNEE CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION,INC. DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION AGENCY'S Motion Requesting Direction From The Court regarding Receiver is continued to July 11, 2012 to address the issues on 1) is it implicit for the court to approve a breach of contract by the receiver ? 2) Receiver's fee 3) Fees the escrow company is claiming.
